questions.question: What TV show had the theme song, 'Thank You For Being a Friend'?
Why was Generation X referred to as the Latchkey Generation?
questions.answer: First generation both parents were at work when kids got home from school.

questions.question: Name one of the three members of Run-DMC.
questions.answer: Joseph 'Run' Simmons, Darryl 'D.M.C.' McDaniels, and Jason 'Jam Master Jay' Mizell

questions.question: What was the general name for the 1970s substantial petroleum shortages in the US, Canada, Western Europe, and Australia?
